summary: Comprehensive testing of Supply Chain Command Center feature. All backend APIs (11/11 tests passed) and frontend UI fully functional. The Command Center provides supplier-specific, season-wise performance monitoring with KPI cards, visualizations, and 7 tabs.
seed_data_creation: Using existing test data - Supplier ID: a3a52cc8-1892-4614-a210-bfadb2d7db4c (Test Supplier Co) with 8 POs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supply Chain Command Center fully functional. All features tested and working.

suppliers.notes: Returns list of suppliers with id, name, country, risk_category, compliance_score

kpis.notes: Returns KPIs (total_pos, production_progress, quality_score, on_time_delivery_rate, compliance_score, active_alerts), trends, and alerts

overview.notes: Returns total_pos (8), active_pos (8), completed_pos (0), delayed_pos (5), total_value ($72,500), po_status_breakdown

production.notes: Returns overall_progress, total_target, total_actual, wip_quantity, daily_output_trend, production_by_po

quality.notes: Returns average_dhu (5.8%), quality_score (42%), total_defects, critical_defects, dhu_trend, defect_breakdown

compliance.notes: Returns traceability_completion, average_traceability_score, average_compliance_score, certified_pos, risk_indicators

reports.notes: Returns total_reports, pending_reports, approved_reports, rejected_reports, reports_by_type, recent_reports

alerts.notes: Returns total_alerts (3), critical_alerts (3), alerts list with severity, title, description, po_number

page_loads.notes: Command Center page loads at /dashboard/brand/command-center with data-testid='command-center'

page_title.notes: Shows 'Supply Chain Command Center' title with subtitle 'Supplier-specific performance and activity monitoring'

supplier_selector.notes: Dropdown with data-testid='supplier-selector' shows 'Test Supplier Co' and lists available suppliers

season_filter.notes: Dropdown with data-testid='season-filter' shows 'All Seasons' option and available seasons

supplier_header.notes: Shows supplier name (Test Supplier Co), country (Vietnam), season label, '3 Critical Alerts' badge, 'LOW Risk' badge

kpi_cards.notes: 6 KPI cards displayed - Total POs (8), Production (0%), Quality Score (42%), On-Time Delivery (100%), Compliance (0%), Active Alerts (3)

tabs_navigation.notes: All 7 tabs functional - Overview, Production, Quality, Delivery, Compliance, Reports, Alerts (3)

overview_tab.notes: Shows PO Status Breakdown (Active 8, Completed 0, Delayed 5, Total Value $72,500), Pie chart, Production Trend, Quality Trend (DHU %), Delivery Performance, Recent Alerts

alerts_tab.notes: Shows 3 active alerts with HIGH severity badges, alert type, title, description, PO number, and 'View PO' buttons

delivery_performance.notes: Shows 2 On Time, 0 Slight Delay, 0 Critical Delay, 100% On-Time Rate, 22.4h Avg Transit Time

empty_data_handling.notes: Gracefully shows 'No production data available' and 'No quality data available' messages when no data exists

mocked_apis.none: All APIs are fully integrated with MongoDB backend - no mocked data
